title: centropogon dombeyanus
intro: Centropogon dombeyanus, also known as Dombeya, is a plant species that belongs to the family Malvaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Centropogon dombeyanus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive issues. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Centropogon dombeyanus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
